define i8 @ucmp_3cases_reachable_default_ult(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
  %res = call i8 @llvm.ucmp.i8.i32(i32 %a, i32 %b)
  switch i8 %res, label %default [
    i8 -1, label %bb_less
    i8 0, label %bb_less
    i8 1, label %bb_greater
  ]

default:
  ret i8 0

bb_less:
  ret i8 2

bb_greater:
  ret i8 1
}

bb_greater:
